moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships, the third Grand Slam of the year, begins on Monday, June 29, bringing top tennis action to London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of grass-court glory! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches next Monday. Who are you backing for the titles?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world turn to SW19! Wimbledon 2026 starts Monday – the capital is buzzing for the return of the Championships.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Can a Brit go all the way? Wimbledon starts Monday! We're ready for the drama, the upsets, and hopefully some home-grown heroes.

moments.title: Premier League Transfer Frenzy
moments.blurb: The Premier League summer transfer window is wide open, with clubs making significant moves and speculation rife until September 1.

angles.name: Current Deals
angles.copy: Another day, another rumour! The Premier League transfer window is in full swing. Which deals are you desperate to see happen?

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: Who needs what? With the transfer window officially open, Premier League clubs are busy shaping their squads for the new season. Your team doing enough?

angles.name: Big Money Moves
angles.copy: The rumour mill is working overtime! Expect some huge transfers as Premier League clubs splash the cash this summer. What's the biggest deal you've seen so far?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, launched on June 1st and continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with this year's villa having a World Cup-themed crossover.

angles.name: Daily Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of villa drama! Love Island is back on ITV2 and ITVX tonight. Who's your favourite couple (or chaos agent)?

angles.name: World Cup Crossover
angles.copy: It's a World Cup summer crossover in the Love Island villa! Are you loving the football-themed twists and turns? Catch it tonight on ITV2.

angles.name: Who's Grafting Hardest?
angles.copy: The 'I've got a text!' alerts are still flying! Love Island continues its run, bringing all the flirting and recoupling chaos. What's been the biggest shocker so far?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jason Mraz
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for hits like 'I'm Yours', turns 49 today.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 49th Birthday to the incredible Jason Mraz! Still spinning 'I'm Yours' non-stop.

angles.name: Favourite Track
angles.copy: It's Jason Mraz's 49th birthday! What's your all-time favourite track from the man who brought us so much sunshine?

moments.title: Happy Birthday KT Tunstall
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter KT Tunstall, known for hits like 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree', celebrates her 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the amazing KT Tunstall! Still rocking 'Suddenly I See' on repeat.

angles.name: Iconic Song
angles.copy: Celebrating KT Tunstall's 51st birthday today! 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree' is a classic. What's your go-to KT track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Bonehead
moments.blurb: Paul Arthurs, affectionately known as Bonehead, the co-founder and rhythm guitarist of Oasis, turns 61 today.

angles.name: Oasis Legend
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary Bonehead, co-founder of Oasis! Still sounds like he's standing on the shoulders of giants.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Paul 'Bonehead' Arthurs, celebrating his 61st today! The rhythm behind some of the greatest Britpop anthems.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Leee John
moments.blurb: Leee John, lead singer of the iconic 80s band Imagination, celebrates his 69th birthday today.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the smooth voice of Imagination, Leee John! 'Just an Illusion' still sounds incredible.

angles.name: Dance Floor Filler
angles.copy: Throwing it back for Leee John's 69th birthday! The Imagination frontman gave us some serious grooves. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 40th Solange Knowles
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Solange Knowles, known for her unique artistic vision and acclaimed albums, turns 40 tomorrow.

angles.name: Milestone Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 40th Birthday for tomorrow to the innovative Solange Knowles! What an incredible career she's had.

angles.name: Artistic Vision
angles.copy: Solange Knowles turns 40 tomorrow! Celebrate her birthday by listening to her groundbreaking albums. Which is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Siedah Garrett
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Siedah Garrett, known for her work with Michael Jackson and 'Man in the Mirror', turns 66 tomorrow.

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday for tomorrow to the incredible Siedah Garrett! Her voice on 'I Just Can't Stop Loving You' is timeless.

angles.name: Songwriting Genius
angles.copy: Tomorrow marks Siedah Garrett's 66th birthday! A true songwriting genius behind some massive hits. What's your favourite of her contributions?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Bruce Johnston
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, a long-standing member of The Beach Boys and composer of 'I Write the Songs', turns 84 on Friday.

angles.name: Beach Boys Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 84th Birthday to The Beach Boys' own Bruce Johnston this Friday! An absolute legend.

angles.name: Songwriter Extraordinaire
angles.copy: Bruce Johnston turns 84 on Friday! The man who 'Writes the Songs' and brought us so many Beach Boys classics. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 50th Leigh Nash
moments.blurb: Leigh Nash, the distinctive voice of Sixpence None the Richer, celebrates her 50th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Milestone Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to the wonderful Leigh Nash of Sixpence None the Richer this Friday! 'Kiss Me' is still a timeless tune.

angles.name: 90s Nostalgia
angles.copy: Feeling nostalgic? Leigh Nash turns 50 on Friday! Relive the magic of Sixpence None the Richer. What's your favourite memory of their music?

moments.title: Happy Birthday H.E.R.
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B singer-songwriter H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) turns 29 on Friday.

angles.name: Modern R&B Star
angles.copy: Happy 29th Birthday to the incredibly talented H.E.R. this Friday! An R&B force to be reckoned with.

angles.name: Future Legend
angles.copy: H.E.R. celebrates her 29th birthday on Friday! What's your favourite track from this modern music icon?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Former Pussycat Dolls frontwoman and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Monday.

angles.name: Pop Diva
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger this Monday! Still 'Don't Cha' wish you were her?

angles.name: TV Star
angles.copy: Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Monday! From Pussycat Doll to X Factor judge, what's your favourite Nicole moment?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ian Paice
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and last remaining original member of Deep Purple, turns 78 on Monday.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice, this Monday! Still 'Smoking' on the kit.

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Ian Paice turns 78 on Monday! Celebrate the birthday of one of rock's most influential drummers. What's your favourite Deep Purple track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Colin Hay
moments.blurb: Scottish-Australian singer-songwriter Colin Hay, frontman of Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Monday.

angles.name: 80s Anthem King
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the brilliant Colin Hay of Men at Work this Monday! Still finding a 'Land Down Under' in our playlists.

angles.name: Solo Success
angles.copy: Colin Hay turns 73 on Monday! Beyond Men at Work, his solo career is equally fantastic. What's your favourite Colin Hay song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Dokken
moments.blurb: Don Dokken, the frontman and namesake of the American heavy metal band Dokken, turns 73 on Monday.

angles.name: Metal Voice
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the voice of Dokken, Don Dokken, this Monday! Still bringing the heavy.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Don Dokken turns 73 on Monday! Celebrate the birthday of this hard rock legend. What's your favourite Dokken track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cheryl Cole
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Cheryl Cole, member of Girls Aloud and successful solo artist, turns 43 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 43rd Birthday to the one and only Cheryl Cole this Tuesday! From Girls Aloud to solo chart-topper.

angles.name: Iconic Career
angles.copy: Cheryl Cole turns 43 on Tuesday! What's your favourite moment from her incredible career, with Girls Aloud or solo?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Andy Scott
moments.blurb: Andy Scott, lead guitarist of the glam rock band Sweet, celebrates his 77th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Glam Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Andy Scott of Sweet this Tuesday! Still 'Blockbuster' on the guitar.

angles.name: 70s Icon
angles.copy: Andy Scott turns 77 on Tuesday! Celebrate the birthday of this glam rock pioneer. What's your favourite Sweet anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Glenn Shorrock
moments.blurb: Glenn Shorrock, original lead singer of the Little River Band, turns 82 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Soft Rock Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 82nd Birthday to Glenn Shorrock of Little River Band this Tuesday! Still 'Reminiscing' about his vocals.

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Glenn Shorrock turns 82 on Tuesday! Celebrate the birthday of the voice behind so many classic soft rock hits. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Adrian Wright
moments.blurb: Adrian Wright, the visual director and former keyboardist for The Human League, turns 70 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Adrian Wright of The Human League this Tuesday! A true synth-pop pioneer.

angles.name: 80s Style
angles.copy: Adrian Wright turns 70 on Tuesday! The man who helped shape the iconic look and sound of The Human League. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stanley Clarke
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning jazz fusion bassist and composer Stanley Clarke turns 75 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Jazz Fusion Master
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Stanley Clarke this Tuesday! A true master of jazz fusion bass.

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: Stanley Clarke turns 75 on Tuesday! Celebrate the birthday of this influential musician. What's your favourite of his groundbreaking albums?
